suite.name: ScienticUiCalculator

kw.name: Run Keywords
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Split String To Characters
kw.doc: Splits the given ``string`` to characters.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Get Value
kw.doc: Returns the value attribute of the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Split String To Characters
kw.doc: Splits the given ``string`` to characters.

Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Contain Any
kw.msg: '0' does not contain any of 'Error' or 'Infinity'
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain any of the ``*items``.
kw.status: '0' does not contain any of 'Error' or 'Infinity'

kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.
kw.status: '0' does not contain any of 'Error' or 'Infinity'

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: '0' does not contain any of 'Error' or 'Infinity'

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Unified UI Test Suite for Scientific Calculator
